summary: A Go-based monolithic project orchestrating AI agents to generate and manage test coverage for a runner, schema, and MCP handler system.
concerns: highly fragmented test generation via external agents (GOrchestra/glm-agents) may lead to inconsistent test quality
large number of *_extra_test.go files suggests potential test duplication or scattered coverage
uncommitted modified files (6 modified, 1 staged) indicates unstable working state
deep nesting of agent-generated directories adds repository bloat
suggestions: consolidate extra tests into standard test files to reduce fragmentation
evaluate if the GOrchestra agent output can be squashed or archived instead of kept in the main tree
commit or stash the current working tree changes to stabilize the branch
focus on the core runner and MCP handler logic as the primary source of truth
